news.headline: RUSSIA SUPPORTED NORTH KOREA'S BALLISTIC MISSILE GUIDANCE PERFORMANCE IMPROVEMENT BY PROVIDING DATA - MONITORING GROUP

news.summary: In New York, The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) has appointed Lisa Sequino as the new President of the Makeup Brand Cluster. She will be in charge of guiding the strategic direction and global expansion of makeup, managing the company’s range of makeup brands - M·A·C, Bobbi Brown, Too Faced, Smashbox, and GLAMGLOW. Reporting to Jane Hertzmark Hudis, Executive Vice President and Chief Brand Officer, Ms. Sequino will officially assume her role in June.
news.headline: Lisa Sequino appointed as President, Makeup Brand Cluster at Estée Lauder Companies overseeing brands like MAC, Bobbi Brown, Too Faced.

news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, Nintendo is expanding the popular Super Mario Party with the release of Super Mario Party Jamboree – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Jamboree TV on July 24. This enhanced version of the game is designed for the Nintendo Switch 2 system, offering fresh gameplay features and increased interaction with loved ones, thanks to the new technology of the console. The upgraded edition aims to provide a more immersive gaming experience. Watch the preview trailer at the following link: [youtube link].
news.headline: New Super Mario Party Jamboree for Nintendo Switch 2 launching on July 24, featuring enhanced gameplay.

news.summary: In Hiawatha, Iowa, a new collaboration between Arreya and Amazon has resulted in the introduction of Amazon Signage Stick, a powerful tool for digital signage that promises simplicity and ease of use. This innovative product allows users to launch vibrant displays in just minutes, making it a convenient option for businesses looking to enhance their visual communication. To entice potential customers, the companies are offering a 30-day free trial of the Amazon Signage Stick.
news.headline: Arreya partners with Amazon to launch powerful digital signage, offering a 30-day free trial for easy setup.

news.summary: SafelyYou, a company specializing in enhancing safety and person-centered care in senior living facilities through advanced AI technology, groundbreaking hardware, and remote clinical support, recently shared that its CEO George Netscher has been appointed to the Board of Directors for Argentum. Argentum is a prominent national association focused on assisting organizations that manage senior living communities with professionalism and resident-focused care. This move highlights SafelyYou's commitment to innovation, quality, and empathy in the senior care industry.
news.headline: SafelyYou CEO George Netscher joins Argentum Board, leading safer senior living. Combining AI and remote care.

news.summary: The article discusses strategies for identifying promising cryptocurrency projects early, avoiding hype-driven investments, and spotting potential red flags. It highlights successful projects like Solana, Arbitrum, Chainlink, and PEPE Coin, showcasing indicators such as onchain metrics, tokenomics, developer activity, and community engagement. It emphasizes the importance of analyzing real signals over manufactured buzz and provides tips on how to differentiate between genuine growth and inflated hype. Tools like Dune Analytics, Nansen, DefiLlama, LunarCrush, and Santiment are recommended for tracking trends. The article also lists key factors for identifying crypto gems early and outlines signs of both real traction and manufactured hype. It warns investors of red flags such as high holder concentration, unverified token contracts, lack of liquidity lock, and upcoming big token unlocks. The emphasis is on conducting thorough research, verifying information, and looking beyond surface level indicators to make informed investment decisions in the volatile cryptocurrency market.
news.headline: Discovering 100x crypto projects ahead of the hype requires analyzing onchain data, tokenomics, dev activity, and community traction. Explore lessons from past successes like Solana, Arbitrum, Chainlink, and Pepe Coin to find potential winners early. Key factors include onchain metrics, tokenomics, developer activity, ecosystem signals, and community engagement. Tools like Dune Analytics, Nansen, and GitHub are crucial for trendspotters. Watch for real traction indicators like steady growth in users, code commits, ecosystem activity, and liquidity. Be cautious of manufactured hype signs such as sudden social spikes or lack of dev activity. Check for red flags like high holder concentration, unverified contracts, and big token unlocks. Spotting crypto trends before the crowd involves thorough research and cross-referencing various data sources to distinguish substance from noise.

news.summary: Foot Locker Inc (NYSE: FL) released its first-quarter results and announced a definitive acquisition agreement by Dick's Sporting Goods Inc (NYSE: DKS), valuing Foot Locker's equity at approximately $2.4 billion and its enterprise at around $2.5 billion. The company reported a 4.6% year-on-year decline in quarterly sales to $1.79 billion, falling short of the analyst consensus of $1.89 billion. Comparable store sales dropped by 2.6% compared to the previous year. Additionally, the adjusted EPS stood at 7 cents. For more details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Foot Locker reports 4.6% sales decline in Q1, now being acquired by Dick's Sporting Goods for $2.4B.

news.summary: NVIDIA Corp (NASDAQ: NVDA) exceeded expectations in the first quarter, reporting revenue of $44.06 billion, surpassing the estimated $43.21 billion. Adjusted earnings were 81 cents per share, or 96 cents per share excluding charges related to chip sales restrictions in China, which was higher than anticipated. Total revenue increased by 69% compared to the previous year. Data center revenue was $39.1 billion, up 73%, while Gaming & AI PC revenue reached $3.8 billion, up 42%. Professional Visualization revenue stood at $509 million, up 19%, and Automotive & Robotics revenue amounted to $567 million, up 72%. Analysts have maintained Buy ratings or increased price targets following these results. Nvidia will pay a quarterly cash dividend of one cent per share on July 3 to shareholders as of June 11.
news.headline: Nvidia stock surges after beating Q1 earnings with revenue of $44.06 billion, up 69% YoY, led by data center growth.

news.summary: In Bridgewater, New Jersey, statistics reveal that menopause is both a medical and personal journey for women, often marked by emotions like shame and confusion. Many women feel neglected and undervalued by the healthcare system as they navigate this transition. The HRT Club, a prominent provider of direct-to-consumer hormone replacement therapies, recently shared data indicating that 32.8% of peri/menopausal American women express interest in hormone replacement therapy. This demonstrates a significant consumer demand for such treatments, highlighting the need for improved support and understanding during menopause.
news.headline: Costs rise & confidence falls, 93% of women demand change in menopause support. New data by The HRT Club: 32.8% American peri/menopausal face dismissal.

news.summary: C3 AI, an Enterprise AI application software company based in Redwood City, California, has revealed that the United States Air Force (USAF) Rapid Sustainment Office (RSO) has increased the C3 AI contract cap to $450 million until October 2029. This boost of $350 million expands the reach of C3 AI's predictive analytics and aircraft maintenance platform throughout the USAF fleet and systems. The original contract had a ceiling of $100 million, marking a significant increase in funding and potential impact.
news.headline: C3 AI's U.S. Air Force contract increased to $450M, up from $100M. Supports predictive analytics for fleet maintenance.

news.summary: In Washington, the Fiber Broadband Association (FBA) has revealed the schedule for Pre-Conference Workshops during Fiber Connect 2025, set to happen from June 1-4 in Nashville, Tennessee. On June 1, the workshops will provide comprehensive guidance on key issues in the fiber broadband sector, like operational expansion and leveraging feedback from gamers for design innovations. These half-day sessions are geared towards addressing industry challenges and opportunities, fostering meaningful discussions and learning experiences for attendees. The Fiber Connect conference serves as a pivotal platform, going beyond a typical event to drive progress and collaboration within the industry.
news.headline: Fiber Broadband Association announces Pre-Conference Workshops at Fiber Connect 2025, focusing on challenges and insights for industry growth.

news.summary: San Francisco-based company Iterable has introduced a new AI query summary feature utilizing Amazon Bedrock technology. This tool aims to streamline segmentation processes and enhance campaign effectiveness for marketers. The integration of AI into the platform is designed to assist in optimizing marketing strategies. This advancement is anticipated to significantly impact marketers by providing them with a more efficient and effective tool for improving campaign performance.
news.headline: Iterable introduces AI query summary with Amazon Bedrock, aiding marketers in campaign targeting. Innovating for easier segmentation.

news.summary: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. has disclosed that its Chairman, Thomas Peterffy, will be speaking at the Piper Sandler Global Exchange & Trading Conference on June 5th at 9:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The presentation will be available for live streaming on the company's website, www.interactivebrokers.com/ir-events. Interested participants are advised to log in ten minutes before the scheduled start time. Additionally, a replay of the presentation will be accessible on the website following the event.
news.headline: Interactive Brokers Group's Chairman will speak at Piper Sandler Global Exchange & Trading Conference on June 5th.

news.summary: Majesco, a prominent provider of cloud insurance solutions, declared its role as a Gold Sponsor at Insurtech Insights 2025 in Morristown, NJ. The company urges insurance executives to challenge traditional business models and technologies to embrace the potential of intelligent insurance. Majesco will be present at Booth #903 on June 4-5 at the Javits Center in New York City. The event will explore cutting-edge topics such as GenAI, AI/ML, and automation, highlighting the need for innovation in the insurance sector.
news.headline: Majesco encourages insurers to embrace GenAI innovation at Insurtech Insights 2025, June 4-5 in NYC. Booth #903.

news.summary: 8x8, Inc., a company traded on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol EGHT, has announced the promotion of Creovai to the prestigious SoldBy8 tier in the 8x8 Technology Partner Ecosystem based in Campbell, California.
news.headline: 8x8 promotes Creovai to SoldBy8 tier for measurable results with agent guidance, part of Tech Partner Ecosystem.

news.summary: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks®, a leading ambulatory cloud EHR provider, disclosed that Alliance Spine and Pain Centers has opted for their innovative AI-powered contact center solution, healow® Genie. This unique system, being EHR-agnostic, has been chosen to handle the increasing influx of patient calls efficiently. The aim is to swiftly address common patient concerns such as appointment requests, prescription refills, medical referrals, and billing inquiries. This move comes as a response to the rising number of calls received by Alliance Spine and Pain Centers, indicating the need for a system to effectively manage the high call volume and enhance patient communication and support.
news.headline: Alliance Spine and Pain Centers in Georgia chooses healow Genie to handle patient calls, a EHR-agnostic AI-powered solution.

news.summary: Walmart Family Mobile, a prepaid brand utilizing Verizon’s network and exclusively sold at Walmart, has launched their most cost-effective plans to date. The company aims to assist families in maintaining connectivity while managing their finances, especially in light of the ongoing inflation affecting households nationwide. The latest offering includes a budget-friendly $19.88 plan, catering to the needs of those seeking affordable communication options during uncertain economic times.
news.headline: Walmart Family Mobile launches most affordable plans to support families during tough times, introduces new $19.88 plan.

news.summary: In Atlanta, OSC Edge, a prominent provider of IT solutions for defense and federal agencies, has successfully attained a perfect score of 100% on its recent Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) Level 2 evaluation as a Candidate Third-Party Assessment Organization (C3PAO). This accomplishment highlights OSC Edge's commitment to providing secure and essential solutions for the Department of Defense (DoD) and other federal clients. This successful assessment demonstrates OSC Edge's expertise and dedication in delivering top-notch cybersecurity services.
news.headline: OSC Edge received a perfect score on CMMC Level 2 assessment as a C3PAO, showcasing commitment to secure solutions for the DoD and federal clients.

news.summary: New York-based company DDC Enterprise Limited (NYSE: DDC) revealed today that they have acquired 79 Bitcoin (BTC) as part of their continued Bitcoin accumulation plan. This move solidifies DDC’s dedication to utilizing Bitcoin's scarcity-driven value as a key element of its treasury reserve. In exchange for the newly acquired BTC, DDC issued 580,187 class A ordinary shares. This resulted in the increase of BTC per 1,000 DDC shares from 0.006122 to 0.024963, marking a significant 400% rise.
news.headline: DDC Enterprise buys 79 BTC, partners with Hex Trust for custody. 580,187 DDC shares exchanged for BTC. BTC per 1,000 shares rises 400%.

news.summary: A real estate company based in Arlington, Texas, D.R. Horton, revealed that it is scheduled to unveil its financial outcomes for the third quarter concluded on June 30, 2025, set to be disclosed on Tuesday, July 22, 2025.
news.headline: D.R. Horton, Inc. to disclose Q3 earnings on July 22, 2025 for the period ended June 30, 2025. #DHI #financials

news.summary: In Irvine, California, 1031 CF Properties, a prominent sponsor specializing in senior housing investments, disclosed that it has remitted all accumulated interest owed to investors in its 1031CF Bridge Fund III offering by April 30, 2025. This settlement encompasses the fulfillment of the 8% preferred return backlog, leading to a dual disbursement for investors in the current month, elevating their total interest earnings to an annualized yield of 15%. Remarkably, the company managed to fulfill these obligations earlier than anticipated.
news.headline: 1031CF Bridge Fund III has paid all accrued interest early, incl. 8% preferred return, totalling 15% annual yield for investors.

news.summary: Bath & Body Works Inc. (NYSE: BBWI) experienced a surge in premarket trading following the release of their first-quarter fiscal 2025 earnings report. The company recorded a 2.9% year-over-year sales increase to $1.42 billion, meeting analyst predictions. Earnings per share also saw growth, rising to 49 cents from 38 cents the previous year, surpassing the anticipated 46 cents. Gross profit climbed by 6.6% to $646 million, with the gross margin strengthening by 160 basis points to 45.4%. Operating income grew by 11.8% to $209 million, resulting in an operating margin of 14.7%. As of May 3, 2025, Bath & Body Works held $636 million in cash reserves. Furthermore, the company reported a 6.8% year-over-year increase in inventories by the end of the quarter.
news.headline: Bath & Body Works beats Q1 estimates with $1.42 billion sales, 2.9% YoY increase. Earnings per share rose to 49 cents.

news.summary: OsteoStrong, a renowned company specializing in scientifically-backed skeletal strengthening technology, is now introducing its services to Guaynabo, Puerto Rico. This expansion, occurring on May 29, 2025, aims to provide the residents of Guaynabo with advanced techniques to enhance skeletal strength. OsteoStrong, a global leader in this field, is setting up a new facility in the area to cater to the growing demand for innovative skeletal conditioning solutions. This development showcases a significant investment in bringing state-of-the-art technology to Puerto Rico, highlighting a commitment to improving the health and wellness of the community.
news.headline: OsteoStrong opens new location in Guaynabo, Puerto Rico on May 29, 2025 - bringing skeletal strengthening technology to residents.

news.summary: Celebrating the impressive 50-year career of artist Il Lee, the Vilcek Foundation is currently showcasing the exhibition "Il Lee—Energy and Flow: Abstraction of Movements" in New York. This exhibit includes twenty-six of Lee's works, highlighting his artistic journey and exploration of movement through abstraction. Visitors can immerse themselves in Lee's unique style and creativity, providing a glimpse into his prolific career.
news.headline: Vilcek Foundation showcases 26 works by immigrant artist Il Lee celebrating his 50-year career in ballpoint pen.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Thirdlove, a renowned female-founded lifestyle brand recognized for its extensive range of sizes and unique half-cup bras, revealed the introduction of TempSync. This innovative collection features bras and underwear that regulate temperature, catering to women's comfort needs.
news.headline: Thirdlove launches TempSync™, a new temperature-regulating intimates collection for women, offering support and comfort.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Fort Collins, Colorado, a company announced a special promotion for Father's Day. They are offering a variety of durable cases and accessories designed by OtterBox to cater to fathers who are always on the go. These products are well-suited for outdoor activities or work environments. This lineup aims to keep fathers connected and shielded from any potential damage. It is a perfect gift for dads who need reliable gear that will last.
news.headline: OtterBox offers rugged gear for Father's Day, including cases and accessories, to keep dad connected and protected.

news.summary: Sally Beauty, located in Denton, Texas, is prioritizing nail innovation, accessibility, and self-expression to appeal to and keep the upcoming generation of beauty consumers. This move is aimed at attracting and retaining younger shoppers. Sally Beauty, renowned for its top-notch nail products, is enhancing its focus in these areas. The initiative comes amidst a rapidly changing beauty retail landscape. The company is working towards boosting its appeal to a new demographic of customers through these strategies.
news.headline: Sally Beauty invests in nail innovation with goal to attract new customers during National Nail Week.

news.summary: Amidst the worldwide resurgence of COVID-19, Bio-healthcare company Dx&Vx (DXVX) from Seoul, South Korea, is advancing as a next-generation vaccine. On May 29, 2025, the company disclosed its plan to broaden its pipelines beyond the universal COVID vaccine. This move comes at a crucial time as the global COVID-19 situation intensifies. Their accelerated development strategy aims to address the pressing need for effective solutions in the face of the pandemic. This announcement signifies a significant step forward in the company's efforts to combat COVID-19.
news.headline: Dx&Vx speeds up universal COVID-19 vaccine development, exploring other pipelines besides reaching South Korea, May 29, 2025

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Washington, the nonprofit organization Modern Classrooms Project revealed that it has secured a substantial $6.9 million grant from the Skeebo Foundation. This funding will be utilized to further develop and implement their curriculum-aligned math solution in classrooms across the country.
news.headline: Nonprofit Modern Classrooms Project receives $6.9M grant from Skeebo Foundation to enhance math education across the US.

news.summary: In Virginia Beach, DOMA Technologies, Livanta, and Advanta Government Services have combined forces to create Commence, a new healthcare technology company. This rebrand comes after being acquired and merged by Pleasant Land. Commence focuses on using a data-driven, human-centered approach to enhance care for beneficiaries, veterans, providers, and other stakeholders. The merger brings together the expertise of three reputable companies to drive innovation in the healthcare sector.
news.headline: DOMA, Livanta, and Advanta Government Services rebrand to Commence in Virginia Beach, focusing on healthcare tech, acquired by Pleasant Land.

news.summary: In Mumbai, India on May 29, 2025, Firstsource Solutions Limited, a prominent global provider of solutions and services and a company under RP-Sanjiv Goenka Group, introduced the Firstsource Gigsourcing Platform. The company is listed on the National Stock Exchange as FSL and the Bombay Stock Exchange as 532809.
news.headline: Firstsource launches Gigsourcing Platform in Mumbai, India on May 29, 2025 (NSE: FSL) (BSE: 532809) as RP-Sanjiv Goenka Group's innovative solution for future work.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, Smart Meter, a top provider of cellular-enabled remote patient monitoring (RPM) solutions, has raised concerns about a significant privacy and data security threat. They have highlighted that numerous connected medical devices are transmitting confidential patient data through servers operated in China before reaching healthcare systems in the United States. The U.S. Federal Government has acknowledged this alarming issue. This practice of routing data through foreign servers has drawn attention, emphasizing a potential risk to patient privacy.
news.headline: Smart Meter warns of security risks in RPM devices sending patient data to China, US Gov investigates.

news.summary: As of May 29, 2025, Brunwick Main Street has achieved accreditation as a Main Street America program after meeting stringent performance criteria. Annually, Main Street America and its affiliates unveil the roster of accredited programs to acknowledge their excellence.
news.headline: Brunswick Main Street accredited for meeting Main Street America standards. Recognized for 2025.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, Empathy, a prominent technology firm revolutionizing the approach to planning and handling life's most challenging situations, disclosed a successful $72 million Series C funding round. The investment was spearheaded by Adams Street Partners and saw involvement from key players like General Catalyst, Index Ventures, Entrée Capital, Brewer Lane Ventures, SemperVirens, Latitude, and LionTree. This latest funding round has propelled the total capital raised by Empathy to an impressive $162 million. As part of this development, the company has also established the Empathy Alliance, a collaborative network aimed at advancing the company's mission and impact.
news.headline: Empathy secures $72M in Series C, forming Empathy Alliance with $162M raised in total from various investors.

Goldman Sach CEO Waldron: The big risk is long-term rates, more so than tariffs.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Vienna, Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange in terms of trading volume, was granted the Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCAR) license by the Austrian Financial Market Authority (FMA). This development marks a significant milestone in the company's expansion in Europe.
news.headline: Bybit obtains MiCAR license in Austria, setting up European HQ in Vienna, aiming for strategic growth.
Goldman Sachs CEO Waldron: Market rightly shifting to US fiscal questions

news.summary: In Phoenix, the University of Phoenix Career Institute® and Motherly launched a new report titled Moms in the Sandwich Generation as part of The Career Optimism Special Report™ Series. The report disclosed that 51% of sandwich generation moms have quit their jobs because of caregiving duties. This highlights the challenges faced by individuals balancing caring for children and elderly relatives. The study also noted an increasing number of men undertaking similar caregiving responsibilities.
news.headline: Study by University of Phoenix and Motherly finds 51% of 'Sandwich Generation' moms left job for caregiving. Men also affected.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Clarity Pharmaceuticals (ASX: CU6), a clinical-stage company specializing in radiopharmaceuticals, revealed its goal of enhancing cancer treatment outcomes by creating innovative products.
news.headline: First patient imaged in Phase III AMPLIFY trial with 64Cu-SAR-bisPSMA PET/CT, Clarity Pharmaceuticals (ASX: CU6) revealed.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, SCOPE Health Inc., a prominent eye care company, announced the addition of new acquisitions to enhance its portfolio of resources for Eye Care Professionals. These acquisitions are expected to revolutionize collaboration opportunities for SCOPE Health Inc. in the eye care industry.
news.headline: SCOPE Health Inc. expands resources for Eye Care Professionals through new technology acquisitions in 2025.

news.summary: BENTONVILLE, Ariz., May 29, 2025 - Formula 100, known for its Precision German Formulations and top-notch bike care products, has recently welcomed hundreds of fresh members to its Formula 100 Test Team. The recruitment took place during the Bentonville Bike Fest event in Bentonville, AR, coinciding with the Memorial holiday weekend. The event drew significant attention and interest, resulting in a large number of applicants being accepted into the Test Team.
news.headline: Formula 100 launched Test Team Program at Bentonville Bike Fest, accepted hundreds of new applicants at the event.

news.summary: The individual responsible for a software program enabling users to deceive fitness apps such as Strava through fraudulent workout data is aiming to convey a broader message. "I believe I am addressing a significant issue," he stated.
news.headline: Developer creates tool to deceive Strava, aims to highlight larger issue; "Poking at a major problem," he said.
